notes: Duplicate key sets reviewed during i18n-resource-dedupe audit. KEEP_SEMANTIC and NEEDS_REVIEW duplicates are allowed so future unreviewed equal-value groups fail the static contract; MERGE_SAFE keys are guarded via merged_keys.

approved_duplicate_groups.rationale: backup_password_label = field label in the encrypted-backup set/enter-password sheets; login_password_placeholder = TextInput placeholder in the native login form. Different UI roles; both naturally render as 'Password' / '密码'.
action_unignore = confirm-dialog verb (mirrors action_ignore); topic_action_unignore_topic = title-bar menu item. Different UI roles; zh/zh_HK/zh_TW happen to render both as '解除忽略'.
System-level labels. app_name = app display name, EntryAbility_label = entry ability label. Different framework purposes even though both are 'Next2V'.
account_remove_label = account management 'Remove' action, common_remove = generic 'Remove'. Different usage contexts.
account_section = settings section header, nav_account = bottom nav tab. Different UI domains.
Four distinct domains: action (swipe), notification type, search filter, site favorite dialog. Different values in base/en_US (action/search/src = Favorite but search_source_favorite = Saved).
Three distinct domains: action, notification, site favorite. Same value in base/en_US but different UI contexts.
action_thank = 'Thank' action, notification_kind_thanks = 'Thanks' notification type. Different grammatical forms. Different values in base/en_US.
Mirror of action_favorite/site_favorite_action_favorite. Same logic applies.
api_error_auth_required = API error 'Please sign in', reply_login_required = client-side 'Log in first'. Different origins and phrasing.
api_error_reply_body_required = API error for empty reply, reply_content_required = client-side validation message. Different origins. Different values in base/en_US.
clear_failed = generic cleanup failure, editor/reply_clear_failed = draft clear failures. Different values in zh_CN (清理失败 vs 清空失败). Different error contexts.
common_clear = generic 'Clear' used broadly (search, editors), markdown_toolbar_clear = markdown toolbar 'Clear' button. Different values in zh_CN (清除 vs 清). Different UI contexts.
common_no_content = generic empty state, editor_empty_preview = editor preview empty state. Different contexts.
Singular 'Node' vs plural 'Nodes'. Different grammatical usage. Different values in base/en_US.
common_save = 'Save' action, nav_storage = 'Storage' nav tab. Completely different semantics. Different values in base/en_US (Save vs Storage).
common_save_failed = generic error used in Settings/Proxy pages; image_preview_save_failed = image-specific error in ImagePreviewPage. Different error origins and contexts.
common_saved = 'Saved' toast, search_source_favorite = search source label. Different values in zh_CN (已保存 vs 收藏). Different semantics.

4 distinct keys: common_topic='Topic' (singular), common_topics='Topics' (plural), theme='Theme' (appearance), user_tab_topics_label='Topics' (user profile tab). Different grammatical and semantic roles.
common_topics = search filter button, user_tab_topics_label = user profile tab. Different UI contexts.

default_proxy_profile_name = default profile name (data value), proxy_config = section label, proxy_config_title = page title. Different semantic roles. Also diverges in zh_HK where default_proxy_profile_name != others.
discover_hot = DiscoverPage filter, v2ex_tab_hot = V2EX API tab. Different values in zh_CN (热议 vs 最热). Different contexts and API domains.
discover_latest = DiscoverPage topic mode filter, topic_detail_tool_latest = topic detail toolbar button. Different pages and contexts.
discover_recent = DiscoverPage filter, search_source_recent = search result source label. Different UI features.
discover_section_saved_nodes = 'Followed nodes' section title, topic_action_follow_node = 'Follow node' action. Different semantics. Different values in base/en_US.

Both = 'Clear draft failed' (清空失败) in all locales (full parity). Editor vs reply composer — different UI entry points but same action semantics. Could merge to single key like clear_draft_failed. However, editor/reply have separate async workflows and could diverge later.
editor_clear_draft_title = topic editor clear draft, reply_clear_draft_title = reply editor clear draft. Different UI domains.
editor_submit = TopicEditorPage submit, reply_submit = ReplyEditorPage/ReplyComposerSheet submit. Different composer contexts.
followed = toast 'Followed', search_source_followed = search filter label. Different values in zh_CN (已关注 vs 关注). Different UI contexts.
ignored_topics = 'Blocked topics' blocked-list tab label, topic_action_ignore_topic = 'Ignore topic' action. Different semantics. Different values in base/en_US.
login_action = 'Log in' action, notification_go_login = 'Go login' prompt. Similar but different phrasing nuance.
login_button_label = login button text, reply_action_login = reply composer 'Login to reply' text. Different UX entry points.
markdown_placeholder_image = placeholder text in editor, markdown_toolbar_image = toolbar button label. Different values in zh_CN (图片 vs 图). Different UI roles.
nav_read_later = 'Read later' nav tab, topic_action_save_later = 'Save later' action. Different semantics. Different values in base/en_US.
nav_reply = bottom nav tab, notification_kind_reply = notification type label, reply_action_reply = reply action text. Three distinct UI domains.
Chinese locale group: adds user_tab_replies_label (user profile tab) to the reply group. All distinct domains.
node_no_topics = empty state in node page, user_profile_no_topics = empty state in user profile. Different pages.
node_picker_search_placeholder = NodePickerComponents TextInput placeholder, search_discover_nodes_placeholder = IndexTitleBar search field placeholder. Different input contexts.
node_topics_count = node page topic count format, search_N_topics = search result count format. Different values in zh_CN ({0} 个主题 vs {0} 主题). Different formats.
notification_go_login = notification prompt, reply_action_login = reply composer login action. Different UX origin.
notification type vs search filter. Different contexts.
Three distinct contexts: notification type, search filter, follow action.
notification_kind_follow = notification type, user_action_follow = follow action. Different UI contexts.
notification_kind_notification = notification type label, tab_notifications = bottom tab. Different domains. Different values in base/en_US (Notification vs Notifications).
original = theme/layout label, reply_display_mode_origin = reply display mode selector. Different UI features.

Both = 'Proxy configuration' (代理配置/代理設定) in all locales. proxy_config used as section label, proxy_config_title as page title. Same value but different UI roles (label vs title). Could merge if the distinction is unnecessary.

Three different reply count formats: reply_count_format for topic detail, search_N_replies for search results, topic_replies_count for topic list. Different values in zh_CN (共 {0} 条回复 vs {0} 回复). Different formats.
reply_ignore_title = dialog title, reply_ignore_reply = dialog body text. Different dialog roles.
reply_report_title = dialog title, reply_report_reply = dialog body text. Different dialog roles.
reply_thread_relation_label_format = reply thread 'Reply {0}', user_tab_replies_count = user profile tab 'Replies {0}'. Different format contexts. Different values in base/en_US.
search results vs topic list. Different contexts even though same value in zh_CN/HK.
search_filter_nodes_library = search mode filter button, search_source_nodes_library = search result source label. Different UI elements.
settings_home = settings page title, tab_home = bottom tab label. Different UI contexts.
site_favorite_title = 'Site Favorite' dialog title, topic_action_site_favorite = 'Site favorite' action. Different UI roles. Different casing in base/en_US.
